Here are the UI in the FadeAid Android App, I need you to mimic this exactly with the PWA app \- the color schemes, the placement etc.

1/ This is the “Settings” home page \- here is what is seen when we go settings  
Ie Settings → Students tab

![][image1]  
2/ This is Settings → alerts tab  
![][image2]

3/ This is settings → About tab  
![][image3]  
4/ This is settings (home) → Students → Configure list Screen  
![][image4]

5/ This is Settings tab → Students → Set-up Session Screen  
![][image5]  
6/ History Tab and how the page looks  
![][image6]  
7/ App’s Analytics tabs and how it looks \- First screenshot and I scrolled and took another screenshot  
![][image7]![][image8]  
8/ FInally, these are the sessions page

![][image9]   ⇒        ![][image10]       ⇒            ![][image11]  
(a) Startup page → (b) Setting up and Initiating the session → (c) While the session is ongoing
